headline: Lennar Leadership Shakeup Tests Asset Light Strategy After Softer Q1 Results
summary: Lennar (NYSE:LEN) has announced major executive leadership changes alongside its Q1 2026 results. Co Chief Executive Officer Jon Jaffe is retiring, with Jim Parker and David Grove stepping into new senior roles. The leadership transition comes as the company reports on its performance during a challenging period for the U.S. housing market. Lennar, trading at $94.96, has seen its share price decline 6.1% over the past week and 22.3% over the past month. The stock is also down 8.9% year to...

headline: Why Lennar (LEN) Is Down 6.1% After Softer Q1 Results And Major Buyback Completion
summary: Lennar Corporation has already reported its Q1 2026 results, with revenue of US$6.62 billion and net income of US$229.38 million, both down from the prior year, while also outlining Q2 guidance for 20,000 to 21,000 home deliveries in a challenging housing market. Alongside softer earnings, Lennar continued its capital return efforts, repurchasing 2,000,000 shares in the latest tranche and completing a multi‑year program that has retired almost 23% of its shares outstanding. We’ll now examine...
